The question is asking how many competitors had more than 100 points. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "total" column in the order of "large to small" using the f_sort_column(total) operation. This will allow us to easily see which drivers have point totals above 100 and count them.

John Briggs had 168 points, Kerry Baily had 150 points, and James Phillip had 112 points. All three competitors had more than 100 points. Therefore, the answer is that 3 competitors had more than 100 points.
